title: PM Execution-Issue Write Surface (Minimal)
objective: Implement the next bounded PM entity write lane by adding create and update contracts, minimal mutation services, and POST/PATCH endpoints for `work.execution_issues` only, reusing the proven task, assignment, and dependency write validation posture for intra-work references while adding merged `work_package_id`/`task_id` validation and an at-least-one-parent API guard without changing database schema or broadening PM mutation scope.
constrained_outputs: Create and update schemas for `work.execution_issues` only, increasing the work schema registry from 18 to 20 entries
Minimal mutation-service and router wiring for `POST /api/v1/work/execution-issues` and `PATCH /api/v1/work/execution-issues/{issue_id}` only

Merged foreign-key validation for `work_package_id` and `task_id` using the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape, plus a `@model_validator(mode="after")` at-least-one-parent API guard and bounded 404 behavior for missing execution issues

Focused regression evidence proving packet-010a, packet-010b, packet-011f, packet-013, packet-013i, packet-013j, packet-014, packet-014i, packet-015, packet-015i, and packet-016 surfaces remain intact after the minimal execution-issue write addition
validation_steps: Confirm packet 017 touches only the bounded execution-issue POST/PATCH runtime path and does not add progress-snapshot or WBS-node writes
Confirm create and update contracts for execution issues reuse the existing model and enum surface where possible and raise the work schema registry from 18 to 20 entries only

Confirm the live write surface merges bad `work_package_id` and `task_id` validation into the existing `OrgValidationError` 422 response shape, mirrors the one-parent-minimum rule through a `@model_validator(mode="after")`, and preserves 404 behavior for a missing execution issue

Confirm packet-010a model tests, packet-010b API tests, packet-011f project-write tests, packet-013 work-package write tests, packet-013i work-package integration smoke, packet-013j response enrichment tests, packet-014 task-write tests, packet-014i task integration smoke, packet-015 assignment-write tests, packet-015i assignment integration smoke, and packet-016 dependency-write tests still pass or skip as expected after the execution-issue write addition
sql_permission_note: Packet 017 is runtime implementation only. No new SQL, schema changes, migration edits, or broader write-surface expansion are authorized.
